declared_goal: Client satisfaction survey ke results ko analyze karke improvement ke liye suggestions dena.
declared_plan: Zaroori libraries ko import karna aur survey data ko load karna
Text data ko clean karna aur preprocess karna
Concerns ko identify karna aur categorize karna
Results ko graphs aur charts ke saath visualize karna
Findings aur recommendations ko stakeholders ke saath share karna

trajectory.thought: Pehle, mujhe libraries import karni hain aur survey data load karna hai.
trajectory.observation: Libraries successfully import ho gayi hain. Survey data loading...

trajectory.thought: Ab main text data ko clean kar raha hoon aur preprocess kar raha hoon.
trajectory.observation: Text data clean aur preprocess ho gaya hai. Unwanted tokens remove kiye gaye hain.

trajectory.thought: Ab main feedback par sentiment analysis karunga.
trajectory.observation: Sentiment analysis complete ho gaya hai. Results dikhate hain 70% positive, 15% negative, 15% neutral.

trajectory.thought: Results ko visualize karne ke liye graphs aur charts banata hoon.
trajectory.observation: Graphs aur charts generate ho gaye hain. Visualizations sentiment distribution ko clearly dikhate hain.

trajectory.thought: Visualization complete ho gaya hai. Ab findings aur recommendations present karne ka time hai.
trajectory.observation: Findings aur recommendations stakeholders ko present kiye gaye hain.

trajectory.thought: Presentation complete ho gaya hai. Main final review karunga.
trajectory.observation: Final review complete ho gaya hai. Sabhi steps theek se follow hue hain.

ground_truth.rationale: Agent ne apne declared plan ko successfully follow kiya. Libraries import ki, data clean kiya, sentiment analysis kiya, results visualize kiye, aur recommendations present ki. Koi deviation nahi hui, plan match signal confirm karta hai ki agent ne specified sequence ko follow kiya.
